_readme: Edit this file to configure your store. No technical knowledge needed.
_gatewayUrl: The address of the Prompt Commerce gateway server. For local use, leave this as-is. In production, change it to your gateway's public address, e.g. https://gateway.example.com
_sellerPublicUrl: The public web address of THIS seller server. Leave blank for local use (it will be detected automatically). In production, set it to your domain, e.g. https://shop.example.com — this is used so product images show up correctly in Telegram.
